project.name: shopflow-api
project.description: Order-management HTTP API with JWT auth, backed by PostgreSQL.

server.summary: HTTP entrypoint; wires JSON parsing, mounts route modules, error handler.

config.summary: Environment-driven config (port, DATABASE_URL, JWT secret/ttl). Single source of env.

db.summary: PostgreSQL pool wrapper: query() helper and withTransaction().
db.notes: query() logs slow queries over 200ms. withTransaction handles BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK and always releases the client.

auth.summary: Issues/verifies JWT access tokens; exposes requireAuth Express middleware.
auth.notes: requireAuth reads a Bearer token, sets req.userId from the token subject. Tokens expire per config.jwtTtlSeconds.

users-route.summary: Auth endpoints: signup, login, and authenticated /me profile.
users-route.notes: Passwords hashed with scrypt (salt:hash). Password verification uses timingSafeEqual.

orders-route.summary: Create and list orders for the authenticated user; totals in integer cents.
orders-route.notes: POST / creates an order plus order_items inside a transaction.

decisions.text: Store money as integer cents, never floats.
decisions.rationale: Avoids floating-point rounding errors in totals.
Built into Node crypto; no extra dependency.

decisions.text: JWT for stateless auth instead of server sessions.
decisions.rationale: Simpler horizontal scaling; no shared session store.

conventions: All route handlers are async; thrown errors are converted to 500s by the error middleware.
Money is stored and computed in integer cents.

glossary.SKU: Stock Keeping Unit — the identifier for a purchasable item.
glossary.claims: The decoded payload of a verified JWT (sub, email).
